[[Vice President/Legends|Vice President]] '''Astre-De-Kay''' was an eligible candidate for the position of President of the [[Tiss'sharl League]] around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. However, the ambitious [[Geor-Dan-Thi]] had De-Kay assassinated, wishing to eliminate all contenders for the Presidency.
